quest_desc: You gave a tiny statue of a talking cat to a ghostly talking deer in a dream, and the deer gave you a nightmare.
dialog_on_success: Why color me impressed, you've done it! Fantastic! I will give you a trinket to remember this night by.
disable_text: No thank you I have one already!

quest_desc: You've heard a legend that if you were to approach the Gate of Fernalla with a worthy gift, it may open for you.

An old Hermit in Fernalla's Field has asked you to recover an old toolbox from a group of bandits who are passing through the area. 

If you are able to recover it, bring it back to him at his home.
dialog_on_success: Praise all, the lock has stood firm!  *The Hermit produces a key and unlocks the box, before handing you its contents.*  He says: "See that this finds its way."
disable_text: What sorcery is this... that is not mine! I have mine here!

quest_desc:
There is a group of people hidden underneath Port Azure near the docks. A spoken password is required for safe entry - it's "Shadowtide".

You should investigate when you're in the city.
dialog_on_success: You may proceed onward, trusted one. Something incredible lies ahead.

quest_desc:
A note was given to you by a strange hermit in Fernalla's Revival Plains. Its addressed to a C. Pillot. 

Find him, wherever he is, and deliver the note.
dialog_on_success: Edgar gave this to you? If he says it's true, it is. My family has held this piece for centuries, but it's time to forge it... its purpose will hopefully reveal itself, because I do not know what that may be.

stable_key: quest:a skeleton eye for alyssa fearnon
quest_name: A Skeleton Eye for Alyssia Fearnon
quest_desc:
Return a Skeleton Eye to Alyssia Fernon in Hidden Hills. 

She has warned you that they're hard to come by, but every now and then you'll find one on a skeleton of any sort. 

She suggested searching in the cave on the north side of Hidden Hills.
dialog_on_success: Wonderful! Thank you! I can use this to create a new spell I think. As a thanks, take this belt - you can put it to good use or just sell it if you like.

quest_desc:
You've earned the favor of a mysterious brotherhood by finding their lost friend.

Per their instructions, you should make your way to the sandbar beneath the statue of Vitheo for a ride to the mainland.
Ghostly beings of Erenshor can leave behind Aetheria if you destroy them. If you find any, Saya Seawatcher in Vitheo's Watch says she has a unique reward for you.
dialog_on_success: You've found some? Color me surprised, it's hard to come by. Here, take this as payment. If you can't use it, I'll buy it back for a handsome price.

quest_desc: Albixt Munger in Silkengrass fears that his missing wife is now one of the risen pilgrims in the area. If you find her engagement ring on one of them, return it to him for a reward.
dialog_on_success: Oh... I thought I would be happy to know that she's at rest but I hadn't imagined how real this moment would be. Thank you for your help, but please leave me be. You can have this as a token of my gratitude.
disable_text: This is not it, I already have it.

quest_desc:
Alice Hewer's necklace was eaten by a small crocodile near the lighthouse! 

If you find it, she would like for you to bring it back to her.
dialog_on_success: Thank you! Here, take this as a token of my appreciation!
disable_text: You've already given me my necklace back. This one's not mine... weird that you found two!

quest_desc:
Rumors of methods to access the Ethereal Planes have been persistent throughout history. 

There may be a way to reach places not meant for humans, and reap the rewards within.
Amethi, just outside of town in Stowaway's Step, has expressed interest in making and repairing keys... if you find any broken ones, bring them her way.
dialog_on_success: Ah, a project! Old one, this one. Where'd ya get it? Ah never mind, here, that was easy. Here you go!
dialog_on_partial_success: What an interesting key piece... but it's missing something. Here, take it back for now but return to me if you find another piece!

quest_desc: Liani Bosh in Port Azure has asked you to forge an Angler's Ring. With it, you can buy a trip back to Stowaway's Step.
dialog_on_success: Yes! This looks right! I will pass this along to my contacts. Your job is to be on the shoreline of Blacksalt under the cover of night. If you're there, he will take you to Stowaway's Step.

quest_desc:
Aragath claims to have been imprisoned by a group of necromancers. He thinks they're behind a hidden door in the Island Tomb near a Stone Throne. 

Destroy the necromancers and collect their soul-stones, and reunite those stones with their linked watchlights to absorb their power.

Return the four charged stones to Aragath.
required_items: Charged Soul Gem (Leah),Charged Soul Gem (Posta),Charged Soul Gem (Revid),Charged Soul Gem (Stalzo)
dialog_on_success: At last! I am free to leave this place - thank you for your help, friend. Please accept this token of my appreciation.
dialog_on_partial_success: Bring me all four at once. Nothing less.
disable_text: I will leave shortly, thank you.

quest_desc:
A group of necromancers in the island tomb claim to be holding a demon named Aragath captive through magic. 

They have asked you to hand the demon an empty soulstone, to absorb his power and finally allow them to leave the island.
dialog_on_success: W... what have you done to me? You BELIEVED them? They're demons! You've given them my soul! *The soul stone dissolves in his hands and a bright light floats off into the sky*
disable_text: I do not need anything else from you. Thank you for your help.

quest_desc: A strange hermit in Azynthi's Garden has taken note of you shouting his name. He asked you to speak it to him in person.
A strange ghostly statue in the Jaws of Sivakaya claims to have 'awoken the guardian' and that you should let it look upon you for a moment.
PLACEHOLDER FOR CONTINUATION
Keep your eyes open for any intel on how or why Sivakayans are gaining access to Port Azure. Share it with Guard Captain Kilkay if you find it.
acquisition_sources: Sivakayan Intel for Kilkay (quest_chain),Sivakayan Intel for Ripper (quest_chain)
dialog_on_success: Eldoth... I should have known. The tragedy at Goodsoil was done by his hand too? He seems to have the ear of the Sivakayans, but why? We shall continue to hold fast here in Port Azure. Thank you for this information.

quest_desc: Fredrick in Port Azure would like bear meat.
dialog_on_success: Ah fantastic! The guards will be thrilled!

quest_desc:
A fisherman has brought you to a small island he happened upon. He claims that the Island matches the description of the lost Bellwain Isle, where a 100-year wanted Pirate retired into hiding with his wife with all of his treasures. 

The fisherman claims to have disturbed nothing, but something mysterious lingers in the air.
You've found some lost letters meant for Captain Bellwain, and you've given them back to Bellsie Bellwain.
dialog_on_success: Oh my... I buried these when I fell ill so not to hurt him... I had forgotten all about them. How did you ever...? Never mind. Thank you. Here, take this - Captain Bellwain won't be needing his coin any longer. He's already home.

quest_desc: You've handed the lost love letters to Bellwain, but he told you they were not his to take.
dialog_on_success: These are... these are precious, but they are not mine to have for they were never put into my hands by Bellsie. Please - allow her to take them, and thank you for thinking of me first.

quest_desc: William Cardigo at Willowwatch has hinted that if you clear out the bonepits, and bring him proof of slaying the "glowing red demon" deep within, he'd make it worth your while.
dialog_on_success: Wow... I've never seen anything quite like this. I didn't think you'd... I don't have much to give you - but I have this: here, take it!

quest_desc:
Braxon Elden in the Braxonian Desert has expressed interest in the scent of Brashell emanating from the covered well that has been recently excavated. 

If you you happen across any Brashell in your explorations, Braxon Elden may be interested in seeing it.
dialog_on_success: Where... did you get this? This is unheard of! If you find more remnants of the old Braxonians, bring them to me - here, a reward for your troubles and a token of friendship.
disable_text: It's so interesting to see this!

quest_desc: You showed the two pieces of the Braxonian Portal to Braxon Elden, and he was able to combine them.
dialog_on_success: Oh my... you've found the keys to Brax's Elemental Plane... I have read about these, and I've studied the ancient portal in Fernalla's Revival Plains. These will combine togther like... this!  *he links the pieces*  You'll need a power source... an Eldrich Crystal would work, though, I've never seen one.
dialog_on_partial_success: What... is this? Do you have the other half?

quest_desc: You need to find an Eldrich Crystal to power the Rune of Brax, and offer both items to the energy source at his Portal.
You showed the writings from Fallen Braxonia to Braxon Elden, and he was most impressed.
dialog_on_success: Amazing! So Brax's decision to smite this land was made easy by the defiance of his own followers! Had they been less selfish, the entire land may have suffered. This is incredible history... here, have this as a reward for your troubles!
dialog_on_partial_success: Incredible... there seems to be another page that goes with this. Do you have it?
disable_text: Ah, these are not new... just copies of what you've shown me.

quest_desc: You handed a fisherman his lunch in in return he mentioned he may share a pirate tale.
dialog_on_success: Ah, thanks kiddo. Appreciate the help. Say, couldn't help but notice you look like the adventurous type. What if I told ya I found somethin' out there in the sea? You ever hear of Old Bellwain Kiddo? No? Well, I ain't gonna bore ya with the tale - not unless you ask me to tell it.
dialog_on_partial_success: Thanks

quest_desc: You should ask the Shady Fisherman on the Port Azure docks to tell you a tale. He claims to have found something in the sea that may interest an adventurous person like you.
dialog_on_success: A tale indeed!

quest_desc:
The Fisherman on the Azure Docks has promised you a trip to a lost Island in exchange for helping him finish his day's fishing quota. 

He needs 4 Octorunners.
dialog_on_success: Look at you go! Nice ones too - this one's even got pink ink! Rare, that! Ok, deal's a deal kiddo - hop in my boat down at the end of the dock and we'll row out. I'm just takin' you though. We're not fixin to cut in a whole crew. Tell your friends to stay home.
dialog_on_partial_success: Need 4 kiddo, no less.

quest_desc:
Brackfruit Breaded Island Fin
1 Island Fin
1 Brackfruit Juice
1 Bread
1 Coal
dialog_on_success: .... The food bubbles and boils and appears to be ready...
dialog_on_partial_success: You're missing at least one piece.

quest_desc: You're not even sure if this really happened.
dialog_on_success: Well! This is delightful! What a strange dream you've wandered into, wouldn't you say? It is not my dream, nor is it yours. It is the dream of all of us! The creeping dark is leaking from the land. You should wake up. Go and see the Conductor!

quest_desc: A Guard in Port Azure has offered you the job of Reliquary Caretaker. All you have to do is go inside and make sure everything is in order. After that, you can do whatever you'd like with it.
faction_affects: Citizens of Port Azure (15),The Azure Guard (15)

quest_desc: William Cardigo has asked you to find out what lurks in the Bonepits and clear it out before it emerges into Willowwatch.
dialog_on_success: So it was summoned? Interesting. I hope you cleared out the Necromancers who are bringing that place back to life too while you were at it. Here, for your time. I don't know what this is but maybe it's useful.
disable_text: Thanks, but you gave me one of these already.

quest_desc:
Lucian has asked for your help in completing the Stowaway Step Ritual. He needs the following legendary items:

A Loss Stone
A Remnant of Sivakaya
A brain warped  by the Sivakayan Dementia 
A Nightmare Crystal
required_items: A Remnant of Sivakaya,Demented Brain,Nightmare Crystal,Loss Stone
faction_affects: Followers Of Sivakaya (-100),The Agents of The Wisp (100)
dialog_on_success: We've done it! A Portal is opening! Stand back, we do not know what's beyond its threshold.
dialog_on_partial_success: You have something interesting here... with the right artifacts we could give ourselves the best chance. The scripture lists some... fabled... items - and you have one already! It calls for A Loss Stone, A Remnant of Sivakaya Herself, A Brain warped by her Dementia, and a Nightmare Crystal. Can you search for these things? Feel free to ask me about any of them for more details.

quest_desc: The Rottenfoot Poachers have asked for Croc tails
dialog_on_success: These are great ones! Keep 'em coming!

quest_desc:
Neziroth Daggerhart had his prized ancestral coin stolen by bandits somewhere in Stowaway's Step. 

If you find it, return it to him near the Shrine to Vitheo.
faction_affects: The Huntsmen (5),The Citizens of Stowaway's Step (5)
dialog_on_success: You found it? My gosh! I don't have much to give, but here - take this. I can no longer put it to good use... or sell it if you'd like.
disable_text: What's this? A duplicate? This is definitely fake!

quest_desc: You have demonstrated your faith in Sivakaya's Gift to proceed into the inner church of the Jaws of Sivakaya.
dialog_on_success: He is great!

quest_desc: Edgar in Silkengrass has promised a generous reward for any Sivakayan Axes or Swords or Sceptres that you're able to bring him.
faction_affects: Followers Of Sivakaya (-1),The Agents of The Wisp (1)
dialog_on_success: Great work!
disable_text: I already have all I can eat!

quest_desc: Edgar in Silkengrass has promised a generous reward for any Sivakayan Axes or Swords you're able to bring him.
faction_affects: Followers Of Sivakaya (-1),The Agents of The Wisp (1)
dialog_on_success: Great work!
disable_text: I already have all I can eat!

quest_desc: Edgar in Silkengrass has promised a generous reward for any Sivakayan Axes or Swords you're able to bring him.
faction_affects: Followers Of Sivakaya (-1),The Agents of The Wisp (1)
dialog_on_success: Great work!
disable_text: I already have all I can eat!

quest_desc: Varran Juctor in Fernalla Field would like some of the beads he sees the Risen Druids behind him wearing. Bring him as many as you can find.
dialog_on_success: Wonderful, I will take more if you have them!

quest_desc: You have been told that it may be possible to combine an Eldrich crystal with an inert rune at the right place of power in order to power the rune once again.
dialog_on_success: This is an Eldrich Crystal... these were said to have been lost to time. The legends say that if combined with the right runestone, at the right place where the God may be present, it would grant access to the Planes of the Gods. Here, take it back. You may find a use for it.

quest_desc:
Nyltih in Hidden Hills has asked for Faerie Dust from the nearby forest.

It could be dropped by any Faerie that you find.
dialog_on_success: That's the stuff, pal! Here, take this sash. It'll serve you well.
disable_text: Already got it from ya! Thanks anyhow.

quest_desc: You've powered your Fernallan Rune

You've encountered a dying wish of Fernalla in the Blooming Sepulcher, and it has asked you to find her brother's tomb and defeat its guardian at the entry chamber. Upon doing so, you should return to this wish with a memory of the Burial
dialog_on_success: You've found it... I feel the possibility of hope within you... I have removed the ward and I ask that you enter this place. Please, child, help me.

quest_desc: You've encountered a second wish of Fernalla in the Blooming Sepulcher. This one has asked you to find Balaste, in Vitheo's Rest, and see if you can sense a memory that might reveal if Vitheo was indeed laid to rest there, and what happened next.
dialog_on_success: Balaste kept his word, and for that I am grateful beyond measure. My brother was there once... and perhaps he remains still. Please, child, continue down this path with me. Let us see this through together.

quest_desc: A wish of Fernalla has asked that you find Elwio the Traitor in Vitheo's Rest, within the Traitor's Halls. She feels a great sadness for him, but cannot recall why.
dialog_on_success: Elwio... I asked him to grant a mercy, to free Vitheo from this realm should the shadow of Sivakaya ever reach for him. I begged that he not allow her to sink her cruel claws into him and twist his will to serve her dark desires. I regret burdening Elwio with this task, but he was our most trusted general...  Please, continue onward, I must make a final request.

quest_desc: Fernalla herself has asked that you find Vitheo and be sure his wordly remains are at rest. She has given you a key ingredient for lighting one of the braziers in his tomb to awaken the Guardian who watches over his inner sanctum's key.
dialog_on_success: He... he understands. He knows I only sought to help him. That is... such a relief. But... no... something is wrong... I can feel it. The darkness is upon me! My will to aid Vitheo held it at bay, but now... I cannot fight it any longer! Quickly, child, leave this place! I can no longer command what stirs within me! My mortal body is no longer important to me.

quest_desc: Handing a Riftsnare Gem to the Flickering Souls in Azynthi's Garden pulls them into full existence...
dialog_on_success: The Flickering Soul suddenly bursts into existence and you feel it brush against your hand.

quest_desc: You've found a blueprint for an Azynthian Resting Place and gave it to a furniture maker.
dialog_on_success: This one's strange... I guess if you're paying though...

quest_desc: You've found a blueprint for an Azynthian Dining Room and gave it to a furniture maker.
dialog_on_success: Oh, this is a good one. I can make this for you now! You'll just need to cover my costs...

quest_desc: You've found a blueprint for an Azynthian Livingroom and gave it to a furniture maker.
dialog_on_success: Oh, this is a good one. I can make this for you now! You'll just need to cover my costs...

quest_desc: You've found a blueprint for an Loomingwood Shrine and gave it to a furniture maker.
dialog_on_success: Oh, this is a good one. I can make this for you now! You'll just need to cover my costs...

quest_desc: You've found a blueprint for an Loomingwood Marketplace and gave it to a furniture maker.
dialog_on_success: Oh, this is a good one. I can make this for you now! You'll just need to cover my costs...

quest_desc: You've found a blueprint for an Loomingwood Shrine and gave it to a furniture maker.
dialog_on_success: Oh, this is a good one. I can make this for you now! You'll just need to cover my costs...

quest_desc: You've found a blueprint for a Stone Auction House and gave it to a furniture maker.
dialog_on_success: Oh, this is a good one. I can make this for you now! You'll just need to cover my costs...

quest_desc: You've found a blueprint for a Stone Bank and gave it to a furniture maker.
dialog_on_success: Oh, this is a good one. I can make this for you now! You'll just need to cover my costs...

quest_desc: You've found a blueprint for a Stone Dining Room and gave it to a furniture maker.
dialog_on_success: Oh, this is a good one. I can make this for you now! You'll just need to cover my costs...

quest_desc: You've found a blueprint for a Stone Fountain and gave it to a furniture maker.
dialog_on_success: Oh, this is a good one. I can make this for you now! You'll just need to cover my costs...

quest_desc: You've found a blueprint for a Stone Training Room and gave it to a furniture maker.
dialog_on_success: Oh, this is a good one. I can make this for you now! You'll just need to cover my costs...

quest_desc: You've found a blueprint for a Stone Vendor and gave it to a furniture maker.
dialog_on_success: Oh, this is a good one. I can make this for you now! You'll just need to cover my costs...

quest_desc: Benson Gamble in Hidden Hills is looking for Graveweed Leaf from the nearby Bonepits. It's located on the north side of Hidden Hills.
dialog_on_success: That's the stuff. We're trying to learn about its properties for fighting undead. Anyhow, here! Take these armguards for your trouble.

quest_desc:
A Stormcaller named Windlae in Hidden Hills has asked that you find and fell a beast in the Brake called Grizzlepaw.

She has observed a remnant of a chain stuck in the beast's teeth that may have belonged to a friend of hers.
dialog_on_success: Ah, so it is true then. Tragedy has befallen my friend but at least revenge has been taken. Thank you for your services, please take this as a token of my appreciation.

quest_desc: Hadden in Fernalla's Revival Plains has asked you to take a package of supplies to Ripper's Keep. They'll give you a receipt, and if you bring that back to Hadden he'll reward you.
dialog_on_success: Hadden sent these? Fantastic! We weren't expecting a delivery. Must be his plans changed. Here, take this back to him please.

quest_desc: Take the receipt of delivery from Ripper's Keep back to Hadden in Fernalla's Revival Plains.
dialog_on_success: You've done it? I knew you could! Probably should have given you these sooner, but ah, here you go!

quest_desc: You've heard rumors of an old tomb on the island that has attracted the attention of strange ritualists. It may be worth investigating if you can find it.
The statue of Sivakaya has gazed upon you.

Vethalo Gala in Port Azure's undercity tunnels has offered you a key to Vitheo's Rest - a hidden tomb beneath the city. 

He's asking for one Sivakrux as a trade.
dialog_on_success: Ah, it's a good one! Here, have your key. Careful in there. It's not a friendly place.

quest_name: A Bounty on Guard Captain Kilkay
quest_desc:
Ripper DeMerth wants you to kill Guard Captain Kilkay in Port Azure, for his role in the abandonment of the Citizens of the North.

Return with proof of his demise.
dialog_on_success:
You've slain that wretch? Good on you and good for us all. A man in his position should never abandon his own people. You are one of us now. Take this, as a sign of our gratitude. 

Let's talk about The Sivakayan Problem. There are rumors of Sivakayans in Port Azure. If you find any evidence of that, bring it to me.
disable_text: This is not anything I'm interested in taking from you.

quest_desc: Deliver the deportation papers to Kio the Light Keeper at the Lighthouse and collect his Gate Key for your own use.
dialog_on_success: I... am so happy. I will leave this place at once... it's cursed here! You'll see! All of you will see! Take this wretched key and be away with you!
disable_text: You've done this to me already! Why rub it in?

quest_desc: You should find the recipient of this note, it looks as though it's never going to find its own way.
dialog_on_success: Ah, so Bassalt will not be making it here then, what a shame. I've discovered something that he wanted for us to tackle together - but maybe not doing so will be for my best. I'll hand it off to you, do with it what you will. I do not know what lies ahead for the one who pursues this.

quest_desc: You have restored the Nighthollow Candle, but it is not lit. You must find a Braxonian Flame to ignite the wick and restore the Candle's true power.
dialog_on_success: ... *The candle comes alive with a flame that can only be extinguished by magic, and while holding it things that you should not be able to see are illuminated in its eerie light*

quest_desc: Foreman Hauck in Port Azure has asked you to explore the Lost Cellar and find any Intel that may or may not exist down there. Bring it to him if you find it.
dialog_on_success: Incredible... it's real? I'll bring it to the Guard Captain at once! Here, take this as my thanks!
dialog_on_partial_success: There's another one that I need too.
disable_text: Oh... they made copies of it? Good for the collection, I suppose.

quest_desc: Handing an Essence of Lost Faith to a Stardust will take away its invulnerability.
dialog_on_success: ... The Stardust flickers sadly for a moment, and looks vulnerable.

quest_desc: You've found the writings of a treasure hunter and you found his phantom on the Duskenlight Coast near the Malaroth Nesting Grounds. He has asked you to continue the hunt in his name, and directed you to his wife for help. He does not recall where he lived, but he says it was in a busy place. He gave you a small pin to prove to his wife that you've met him.
required_items: Pg. 1: Faded Entry,Pg. 2: Faded Entry,Pg. 3: Faded Entry,Pg. 4: Faded Entry,Pg. 5: Faded Entry,Pg. 6: Faded Entry,Pg. 7: Faded Entry
dialog_on_success: Oh my... these are all mine! I... I remember! There is something special here on Erenshor and I was so close! But... what was it? You must help me! Please, find my home. I cannot recall where it was but I know it was in a bustling place. My wife may still be there - give her this as proof and tell her about our encounter. She will help you!
dialog_on_partial_success: I... this looks familair to me. Are there more?
disable_text: Oh my, someone made duplicates of these?

quest_desc: You've reminded a phantom of who he was in a past life, and he has asked you to continue his treasure hunt. He gave you a pin and directed you to speak to his wife, using the pin as proof of having met him. He said she will help you pick up on his quest where he left off.
dialog_on_success: You've... you've met Benjamin? So he is lost, then. It's just like him to not even rest in death, so you must help him. This is his journal - take it. See if you can find what he was after and please bring it back to him if you find it.

quest_desc: You have a deceased treasure hunter's journal, and a request from his widow to continue his quest. You should bring whatever you find back to him to help put him at rest.

You've made Malaroth Food with:
1 Octorunner
1 Frowney Clowney
1 Azure Mead
dialog_on_success: .... The food bubbles and boils and appears to be ready.
dialog_on_partial_success: You're missing at least one piece.

quest_desc:
You've made Malaroth Food with:
1 Octorunner
1 Frowney Clowney
1 Azure Mead
1 Moongill
required_items: Azure Mead,A Frowny Clowny,A Moongill,An Octorunner
dialog_on_success: .... The food bubbles and boils and appears to be ready... but smells strange
dialog_on_partial_success: You're missing at least one piece.

quest_desc: Prichard Zemoro has asked you to bring him a treasure map and an elixir of enlightment II. He says he'll give you a Sivakrux for each combo you bring. Prichard is in the slums of Port Azure.
dialog_on_success: That's the stuff, yes indeed! Here's your coin, whatever it's for, I hope it works.
dialog_on_partial_success: No no no, not that! I want the second XP potion, and a map!

quest_desc: There is a fisherman waiting for you under the cover of night in Blacksalt Strand to take you back to Stowaway's Step.
dialog_on_success: Say nothin' to noone! Get on the boat, let's go.

quest_desc:
Xander Zaxtrough in Hidden Hills made mention of a missing person he's hunting for. He suspects that the Molorai Militia are holding this person somewhere on Erenshor. 

He mentioned Old Krakengard specifically.
dialog_on_success: Yes... yes there you go. I'll make my way out when it's clear. Thank you. I can't pay you but I have powerful friends. We've found something hidden on the docks in Port Azure. Go to them, there's a false wall. Use the passphrase if they ask, it's "Shadowtide".

quest_desc:
Bring 5 Nagalok claws to Annaleigh in Salted Strand. 

She thinks she may be able to make something out of them that you would find useful.
dialog_on_success: Well would ya look at that! Added a little bit of seaweed and got something pretty fine!

quest_desc:
Trevor Urchand in Hidden Hills is doing research on Eldoth Molorai. He suspects Eldoth has ties to the resurgence of Necromancy on Erenshor, but needs to know more. 

He says that there may be Necromancers in the Bonepits, and should you find any of their ritual books, he'd like you to bring it to him.
dialog_on_success: Well, look at you - almost a real adventurer, aren't ya? Thanks for bringing this to me. I've got an extra bit of armor here, use it or give it to a buddy. Or sell it, for all I care.
dialog_on_partial_success: You're missing at least one piece.

quest_desc: A note found on Raval's corpse was accepted by the Solunarian Holy Guard. He was not happy to read it.
dialog_on_success: You meddle in things you do not understand. Raval was sacrificed to preserve Soluna herself. If he is not honored to have enjoyed that opportunity, he is no Paladin, and you having dispatched him was a favor to Soluna. Our gratitude is with you.

quest_desc: Feed an Eye of Plaxitheris to Occuphage under the lighthouse.
dialog_on_success: Yess.... YESSS.... a reward!

quest_desc:
A scribbled note from a madman in the desert has revealed that a mysterious stone that he was holding was the property of Orion Mycon in Port Azure. 

Orion may be interested in receiving it back...
dialog_on_success: Where did you find this...? It was stolen from me in the night. I was able to fight off the intruder before he did me harm, but he was able to unsocket the gem from this Elderstone band. I have no need for the ring any longer nor the trouble it has brought. You can keep it. *He fits the gem loosely into the slot and hands it back to you* Might even be fixable by a jeweler.

quest_desc:
Orion Mycon has given you his damaged ring. If you can fix it, it's yours. 

He said you should find a jeweler for more help.
dialog_on_success: What an incredible ring! The band... it's Elderstone. And I've never seen a gem quite like that one. I could repair it, sure. I'd need an Elderstone shard and... something to act as a conduit between gemstone and band. A bit of Citrine Sandsilver would work!

quest_desc: Parmalee Gemlyn has asked you to bring back the broken ring, an Elderstone Shard, and a chunk of Citrine Sandsilver in order to repair Orion's Ring
required_items: Elderstone Shard,Chunk of Citrine Sandsilver,Unsocketed Ring
dialog_on_success: It's SPLENDID! The stone... it's blooming like a flower. It's taking energy from the Elderstone and... oh! Look inside! It's like a miniature storm!
disable_text: I can't do that again... it was too much for me.

quest_desc: In return for Seaspice, Percy Ildia gave you a note with instructions to give it to the boat captain on the docks who was preparing to leave.
dialog_on_success: What's this...?" *She unrolls the note* "...passage to Erenshor by order of Percy? Hahaha! He's out of his mind. I don't owe him a thing. Sorry pal, no can do.

quest_desc:
Percy has asked for some Sea Spice and in return he has promised passage off of the island. 

He is behind the registration office.
dialog_on_success: Yes! Thank you!  ....oh, erm... here - take this note to that Captain lady on the dock who's getting ready to leave. She owes me a favor, and she'll get you to Erenshor. Nice doin' business with ya!
disable_text: Come on now... you're not that gullible!

quest_desc: A portal exists between Blooming Sepulcher and Vitheo's Rest - you can re-activate it by bringing a piece of Vitheo's Rest to the Remnant in Blooming Sepulcher
dialog_on_success: Siblings are linked in many ways...

quest_desc: You've achieved something impressive.
dialog_on_success: W... what is this? I feel so strange! Like I've held this before... Like I've been to places that do not exist. Why are you giving this to me? What am I to do with this? *In his confusion, Kio hands you a lantern and waves you off...*

quest_desc: Raval, the First Paladin, has been trapped in an insanity wracked body for centuries. You've freed him and found his spirit, and his last wish is to know that Astra, the Celestial Dragon, has finally been removed from this plane.
dialog_on_success: You... you've done it? I cannot believe it. Your power must be immeasurable!  Perhaps *you* will be the one to find the answers to the questions that have tortured us for so long. Here... take this. If you can find a way to use it, you may learn secrets that will change the world forever...
disable_text: I'll leave shortly, thank you again.

quest_desc:
Larviso in Loomingwood has told you about the Nighthollow Candle. It was stolen from The Wisp long ago. If you find any trace of it, bring it to him. 

He mentioned that a Sivakayan Darkwarden may have interest in it, or perhaps its lost in the Braxonian Desert... worse yet, an antiquities dealer may have recovered it.
dialog_on_success: I cannot believe you have recovered the candle! We must piece it together at once and light it. Only a flame of Brax will be sufficient - you must find a place where the flames of Brax burn strong, and ignite the candle! It will guide you into the Jaws of Sivakaya, and we may finally learn how to restore her.
dialog_on_partial_success: Amazing... this is a piece of the candle! There should be a base, wax, and a wick. Find them all and bring them here!
disable_text: What is this, a replica? We have the real candle already.

quest_desc:
Register yourself on the island by bringing your Dock Papers to Controller Wendyl in the registration office.

The registration office is the large building near the docks.
dialog_on_success: Welcome to Stowaway's Step. You can head up the hill into town. Tell Slate over at the gate that you're registered.

quest_desc:
Go to the Gate and tell the Guard there that you've registered to gain a key to the pass through to the rest of Stowaway's Step. 

(To tell the guard you've registered, target him and press ENTER to type. Type 'I'm registered'.)
You've placed the Rune of the Hills in its receptacle in the Reliquary
dialog_on_success: ... *The rune slides neatly into its place, and a portal flames to life. To your surprise, you can remove it again.*

quest_desc: You've placed the Rune of Ripper in its receptacle in the Reliquary
dialog_on_success: ... *The rune slides neatly into its place, and a portal flames to life. To your surprise, you can remove it again.*

quest_desc: You've placed the Rune of Sands in its receptacle in the Reliquary
dialog_on_success: ... *The rune slides neatly into its place, and a portal flames to life. To your surprise, you can remove it again.*

quest_desc: You've placed the Rune of Silkengrass in its receptacle in the Reliquary
dialog_on_success: ... *The rune slides neatly into its place, and a portal flames to life. To your surprise, you can remove it again.*

quest_desc: You've placed the Rune of Soluna in its receptacle in the Reliquary
dialog_on_success: ... *The rune slides neatly into its place, and a portal flames to life. To your surprise, you can remove it again.*

quest_desc: You've placed the Rune of Winds in its receptacle in the Reliquary
dialog_on_success: ... *The rune slides neatly into its place, and a portal flames to life. To your surprise, you can remove it again.*

quest_desc:
Guard Captain Kilkay in Port Azure was not pleased with the note Ripper had his men send along. 

He has warned you away from Ripper and his "traitorous army", and has said that if you can acquire their Insignia Badges, he'll reward you handsomly.
dialog_on_success: Ah yes, a fine one! Here you go!

quest_desc: Ripper has mentioned rumors of Sivakayans in Port Azure. She has asked that you keep an eye open for evidence of that, and bring it to her should you find it.
acquisition_sources: A Bounty on Guard Captain Kilkay (quest_chain)
required_items: Sivakayan Encrypted Plans,Sivakayan Codex 1 of 4,Sivakayan Codex 2 of 4,Sivakayan Codex 3 of 4,Sivakayan Codex 4 of 4
dialog_on_success: It's true! Sivakayans have gained access... it appears through the lighthouse? Take this, our spies have keys to everything. See what you can find in there. Despite our differences with the Azure Guard, of course the citizens deserve to be safe.
dialog_on_partial_success: There are more pieces to this... but it's a fantastic start! Please, keep looking.

quest_desc: Ripper has reviewed the encryption you brought to her and has determined that Sivakayans have gained access to Port Azure through the lighthouse. She has asked that you investigate.
dialog_on_success: Eldoth... that monster has his hands in everything on this continent. Even if you've dispatched him I expect he is not truly gone. We'll remain here if Azure asks us for help, but until then it would appear that they can only wait and see what comes next. This is not mine to reward but it seems fitting to share with you. Take it, please. On behalf of the Citizens of Azure.

quest_desc:
Guard Captain Kilkay in Port Azure has offered a reward for the death of Ripper DeMerth, a traitor to Port Azure.

Return with proof of the demise of Ripper.
dialog_on_success: Ripper must have been no easy opponent. You don't look the type to best her in combat, but I won't ask questions. The world is better off without her, thanks to you. Now... we must discuss the issue with the Sivakayans. (UNFINISHED DIALOG - ASSIGN PLACEHOLDER QUEST)
disable_text: This is absurd. You've given me Ripper's ear already. Did you go back and cut off the other one?

quest_desc: Mavik Estonia, of Ripper's Army, has requested you deliver a message to Guard Captain Kilkay in Port Azure.
dialog_on_success: Ripper is a traitor to Erenshor who will be dealt with right along with the Sivakayans. In fact... tell ya what: wipe them out and bring me back their insignia badges, and I'll make it worth your while for every one of 'em.

quest_desc:
Jeremie Galyard has offered to trade a trinket he found in Ripper's Keep that he says may have belonged to Azynthi. 

He wants 3 bottles of Azure Mead and a Seaspice.
dialog_on_success: Ah, fantastic! And for you, this weird little rock. Whatever it's for, I hope you can use it.
dialog_on_partial_success: That's not everything I asked for...
disable_text: I'm still good pal, thanks anyhow.

quest_desc:
Torado in Wardhaven has asked if you could help him gather components for The Rituals they must perform to restore Sivakaya. He needs:

1 Intact Faerie Wing
1 Devoratrix Thorn
1 Pink Pteriaped Feather
required_items: Devoratrix Thorn,Intact Faerie Wing,Pink Pteriaped Feather
dialog_on_success: Fantastic! These are hard to come by. You know what else is hard to come by? This Aura - please use it well!
dialog_on_partial_success: Almost... need a bit more.
disable_text: I'm all set for now, but thanks

quest_desc:
Alitho, a collector in Port Azure, has asked for you to bring him any Rottenfoot sashes that you may find. 

The Rottenfoot swamps would be a logical place to search for these sashes.
dialog_on_success: Oh it's a spectacular specimen! If you have more, bring them! Here's some gold for your troubles!

quest_desc: Samuel in Hidden Hills has asked you to deliver a note to his good friend Harvey Alder, who is likely staying at the Azure Arms in Port Azure.
faction_affects: Citizens of Port Azure (1),People of Erenshor (1)
dialog_on_success: Ah, Samuel is a good friend. Thank you for bringing this to me. I don't have much, but take this as a token of my gratitude... and welcome to Port Azure.
disable_text: Are you making forgeries now? Get a life.

quest_desc: You've found ancient Siva-Braxonian teachings that reveal some surprising world history. You've given them to Braxon Michaen who was very impressed.
dialog_on_success: These are an amazing find! How did you - nevermind. Brax and Sivakaya were... lovers? This means that her corruption may have thrown Brax into a wild rage - he buried Braxonia in this fit to stop Azynthi's blight. One might wonder if that was truly the only solution? Here, it is yours to keep. I have seen what I needed.
dialog_on_partial_success: Is this real? My my... it looks like there may be more pieces, keep going!

quest_desc:
Serra Stile lost her family heirloom shovel in the Elderstone Mines incident. 

She believes it was taken by a slime. If you happen across it, return it to her.
dialog_on_success: Oh my! You've found it! Here... one tool in exchange for another. I hope this comes in handy!
disable_text: This is someone else's I think. I have mine already.

quest_desc:
You've met a Shard of Sivakaya inside the portal at the Stowaway's Step Ritual. She warned you of a corruption taking over Erenshor, and asked that you help free the Gods who have touched this world. 

She faded out of existence after her warning, cautioning you of a manifesting corruption nearby.
You met a strange being called "The Curator" on Shivering Step
You've made quite a mark on Shivering Step. It's time to go home.
dialog_on_success: Ah, well done then. Take this, dream of us.
disable_text: Ah, deja vu is a fancy thing.

quest_desc:
You've been pulled into a game of hide and seek... 

Someone (or something) is waiting to be found on Shivering Step.
dialog_on_success: Eehehehe!!!

quest_desc: You met a strange being called "The Gatekeeper" on Shivering Step
You've learned that seeing is not always easy, but is possible in any light.
You met a strange being called "The Harbinger" on Shivering Step
It may be beneficial to find a way to change the lighthouse color to brighten up the island further...
dialog_on_success: ... *The oven glows with an unnatural blue color"
disable_text: ... *The flame flares, but does not change.*

quest_desc: Kio has summoned you to the lighthouse to get your lamp for whatever he has in store next.
Find the four spirits of Shivering Step.
You should find a way to ignite the Brazier deep in the cold Island Cave.
required_items: Ancient Fang,Death's Decay,Eternal Ice,Soul of a Ghostly Beast,Thief of Breath
dialog_on_success: ... *The Flame ignites before you, and suddenly the air feels warmer*
dialog_on_partial_success: ... *The flame sputters.*

quest_desc: You met a strange being called "The Bridgekeeper" on Shivering Step

stable_key: quest:a magical sword in port azure
quest_name: A Magical Sword in Port Azure
quest_desc:
There is a magical sword to be had in Port Azure. 

Find a Ruby and two Seaspices for Tristian, who is loitering in the back lots of the houses near the main gate.
dialog_on_success: You found it all? Well, deal's a deal. Here's your sword. Hope you can use it better than I would've!

stable_key: quest:a sivakayan horn for ludo luxo
quest_name: A Sivakayan Horn for Ludo Luxo
quest_desc:
Ludo Luxo in Hidden Hills has asked for you to find a Sivakayan Horn from the Bonepits - a cave on the north side of Hidden Hills. 

They make great sharpening stones.
faction_affects: Followers Of Sivakaya (-5),The Blades of Vitheo (5)
dialog_on_success: Ah, I'll have the sharpest weapons on the Brackish Coast now. And for you, I gift you balance. Wear them with skill, friend!

quest_desc:
A recovered page of Sivakayan Intel was handed to Guard Captain Kilkay, who was appreciative of the info.

He has asked you to continue to search for information on how Sivakayans may be entering Port Azure.
dialog_on_success: I have suspected the Sivakayans have been within our walls for some time now. This only confirms my fears. I implore you to find more information... If you learn of how the Sivakayans are entering Port Azure, please bring that information to me!

quest_desc: A recovered page of Sivakayan Intel was handed to Guard Captain Kilkay, who was appreciative of the info.
dialog_on_success: We've had mixed information, but this seems to be definitive - the Sivakayans are gathering to march on the city. Our preparations are justified. Thank you for sharing this with me.

quest_desc: A recovered journal of a Sivakayan Darkwardenl was handed to Guard Captain Kilkay, who was appreciative of the info.
dialog_on_success: Ah, so Molorai is behind the Goodsoil attack somehow? Knew he was trouble. Still, the Sivakayans did it, but what is Molorai using them for? If you discover anything more, bring it to me.

quest_desc: Ripper asked for you to bring any information you find on Sivakayan activity to her.
dialog_on_success: They fear us, as they should! It strikes me as odd that every Sivakayan writing I find does not reference Sivakaya even once. It's as though this... this Azynthi has taken over. You should find him. We'll keep our ears to the ground.

quest_desc: Supply Sergeant Tipp wants Sivakayan Ore. He says their soldiers carry it sometimes, but it's hard to find.
dialog_on_success: Well look at you... I'm surprised you managed. Here, I had a chunk a while back and managed to have someone fashion this.
dialog_on_partial_success: Bring me a few more first! I need four.
disable_text: I have all I need, thank you for your help.

quest_desc:
Despite reports of Sivakayan raiders headed to Port Azure, none have been seen within the city. 

It is suspected that they may be lurking inside the city, somewhere in the shadows. 

If you're able to locate them, report to Captain Kilkay.
required_items: Sivakayan Encrypted Plans,Sivakayan Codex 1 of 4,Sivakayan Codex 2 of 4,Sivakayan Codex 3 of 4,Sivakayan Codex 4 of 4
faction_affects: Citizens of Port Azure (25),Followers Of Sivakaya (-25)
dialog_on_success: Oh my... they're truly here! It appears they've carved out a spot beneath the lighthouse! Quickly, go! Search the lighthouse!
dialog_on_partial_success: These are interesting... it looks like we're missing at least one piece though. Are they really plotting something? Hurry up, find out more!
disable_text: I've seen this already. If you find more, bring it to me.

quest_desc:
The Guard Captain in Port Azure has reviewed the Sivakayan Encryption that you have found and has determined that the Sivakayans have created a secret access point in the Port Azure Lighthouse.

He has given you a key and asked you to investigate.
faction_affects: Citizens of Port Azure (25),Followers Of Sivakaya (-25)
dialog_on_success: I knew Eldoth was working with them! Removing that fiend from this town was the right decision after all. Thank you for your help. There's nothing left to do but bolster our defenses and see what comes until reinforcements arrive. Take this, as a sign of your loyalty here. It may serve you someday.
disable_text: I've seen this already. If you find more, bring it to me.

quest_desc:
Once wielded by Soluna herself, the blade was forged from the metal of a moon and bathed in the flames of stars. It is rumored to exist on this plane. 

If your travels bring you across clues, take note.
You've found a Paladin trapped by Azynthi who claims to have had knowledge of Soluna's Celestial Blade stolen from him. If you can restore him, he may be able to share it with you.
dialog_on_success: Yes! Oh, you've done it! I... I remember! It's all coming back to me! (TO BE CONTINUED)

quest_desc: TO BE CONTINUED
You've powered your Solunarian Rune
Capture Leah's soul from her watchlight on Stowaway's Step
dialog_on_success: The Watchlight flickers and dims, while the Soul Gem glows vibrantly.

quest_desc: Capture Posta's soul from his watchlight on Stowaway's Step
dialog_on_success: The Watchlight flickers and dims, while the Soul Gem glows vibrantly.

quest_desc: Capture Revid's soul from his watchlight on Stowaway's Step
dialog_on_success: The Watchlight flickers and dims, while the Soul Gem glows vibrantly.

quest_desc: Capture Stalzo's soul from his watchlight on Stowaway's Step
dialog_on_success: The Watchlight flickers and dims, while the Soul Gem glows vibrantly.

quest_desc: You have found a way to move the fallen angel statue out of the way on Shivering Step
Through Larviso, Sivayaka has shown you that Azynthi's corruption has taken hold of all of the Gods of Erenshor. Fernalla, Vitheo, Soluna, and Brax.
You are stranded on Stowaway's Step. There has to be a way off... You should ask around and see what you can learn.
Ta'Dah, the hidden Sorcerer for Ripper has stopped you and offered you a prize for collecting three intact mushroom caps from the cave near Ripper's Keep.
dialog_on_success: Well well, these will do nicely for my project. You see, they never remain intact due to my... magical powers. I blow them right to bits. Ah, but here we are. You are a true friend, and Port Azure is open to your travels once more, with this!
dialog_on_partial_success: I asked for three, please.
disable_text: I do not need more, but thank you.

quest_desc: You've found a strange boatman in The Blight and presented your found "Boat Pass" to him. He will grant you passage to Azynthi's Garden now, at your leisure.
dialog_on_success: Ah yes, official documents indeed. Proceed onto the boat when you're ready and we'll set course for The Garden.

quest_desc:
To ignite, combine the following in the Dark Flame Brazier in Vitheo's Rest:
2 Blight Crystals
1 Blightwood slab
1 Spark of the First Flame
required_items: 2x Blight Crystals,Blightwood Slab,Spark of the First Flame
dialog_on_success: ... *The Flame ignites before you, filling the air with a deathly scent.*
dialog_on_partial_success: ... *The flame sputters.*

quest_desc:
The Ceremonial Flame requires:
1 Ancient Coal
1 Elderstone Shard
1 Wolf Meat
1 Pristine Grass Spider Carapace
required_items: Elderstone Shard,Pristine Grass Spider Carapace,Wolf Meat,Ancient Coal
dialog_on_success: ... *The Flame ignites before you, and the gateway begins to glow*
dialog_on_partial_success: ... *The flame sputters.*

quest_desc:
To ignite, combine the following in the Life Flame Brazier in Vitheo's Rest:
1 Essence of Nature
1 Gift of Fernalla
1 Loomingwood Branch
1 Droplet of the First Frost
required_items: Droplet of the First Frost,Essence of Nature,Gift of Fernalla,Loomingwood Branch
dialog_on_success: ... *The Flame ignites before you, filling the air with a vivid chill.*
dialog_on_partial_success: ... *The flame sputters.*

quest_desc: A Ghostly Figure has handed you a stone that contains the very sadness that has been brought upon the world by Azynthi. She instructed you to bring it to someone who might know its true power, she suggested someone who mourns the loss of Sivakaya may be best.
dialog_on_success: Where did you get this? It's... ancient! This is incredible. It's a Loss Stone, I've only read about them. They're empathetic stones, which absorb sadness and sorrow from a place or time and store it as the most pure energy. We may be able to use this to restore Sivakaya! The ritual is still going on Stowaway's Step, you need to go back there and show this to Lucian at once.
disable_text: It's so incredible! Get it to Lucian.

quest_desc: You've been told that it's imperative to get the Loss Stone back to Lucian at Stowaway's Step.

You've found a note in the pocket of Brice Mathers. It instructs you to find his brother in Goodsoil. 

His brother's name is Yarren - if you cannot find him, ask for him.
dialog_on_success: Oh no... this was Brice's worst fear! We believe Eldoth is involved with The Wisp and that he is behind something far more sinister than I have time to explain. Brice gave me this key for safe keeping. He was afraid Eldoth's men would come for it. He discovered an old Sivakayan church buried in the hills of Blacksalt and this key is the only one in existence. See what's in there... and bring any tomes you find back to me. For Brice...
disable_text: You have the key... if you've lost it I don't know what to tell you. I do not have another.

quest_desc:
Yarren Mathers has given you a key to an old church he says is buried in the hills of Blacksalt Strand. 

Locate the church, and see what secrets it holds. 

Return any tomes you find to Yarren and he may share more of what he knows with you.
required_items: Chapters of Descent, Passage 1,Chapters of Descent, Passage 2,Chapters of Descent, Passage 3,Chapters of Descent, Passage 4
dialog_on_success: Oh my, this is alarming! These are the pages Eldoth must have been after when he killed Brice for the church key! Eldoth is trying to uncover information about Sivakaya or The Wisp... but why? You must find more of these pages!
dialog_on_partial_success: This seems to be but a piece of the puzzle... we need all the pieces!
disable_text: We've covered this already... show me anything new you find!

quest_desc:
Yarren Mathers has studied the Chapters of Descent you found in the old Church.

The tale of Sivakaya, Azynthi, and The Wisp has become more clear, but is still shrouded in mystery. 

Yarren has asked you to search for more pages from the Chapters of Descent.
required_items: Chapters of Descent, Passage 5,Chapters of Descent, Passage 6,Chapters of Descent, Passage 7,Chapters of Descent, Passage 8
dialog_on_success: Eldoth must have known Sivakaya's followers were split... he was trying to take over and rally those lost souls behind himself. I fear that even though you've dispatched Eldoth, he may not be truly gone. Be wary my friend. Have this, as a token of my gratitude.
dialog_on_partial_success: A whole second set of entries! Fascinating! There's more - you're missing some!
disable_text: We have seen these pages already, have you forgotten?

quest_desc:
The Ceremonial Flame in Fernalla's Revival Plains requires:

1 Ancient Coal
1 Faerie Dust
1 Remnant of a Day Dream
1 Remnant of a Nightmare
required_items: Bag of Faerie Dust,Remnants of a Daydream,Remnants of a Nightmare,Ancient Coal
dialog_on_success: ... *The Flame ignites before you, and the gateway begins to glow*
dialog_on_partial_success: ... *The flame sputters.*

quest_desc: The odd Hermit has given you a Riftstone and instructed you to find "The Riftsnares" to "Pull the four souls into this realm and destroy them."

The Ceremonial Flame at Ripper's Keep requires:

1 Sivakrux
1 Planar Stone Shard
1 Ghostly Giant's Blood
1 Unborn Phobia
required_items: Ghostly Giant's Blood,Sivakrux,Unborn Phobia,Planar Stone Shards
dialog_on_success: ... *The Flame ignites before you, and the gateway begins to glow*
dialog_on_partial_success: ... *The flame sputters.*

quest_desc:
The village of Goodsoil in Fernalla's Revival Plane was destroyed by forces unknown. 

Rumors are abound, but figuring out what truly happened may take more time.
Sivakaya has asked you to obtain the Secrets of Creation from the corruption that will manifest in the Stowaway's Step Portal. She wants you to bring it to The Wisp.
dialog_on_success: I cannot believe this. You've done it... *The box opens easily with his touch, and he seems haunted by visions momentarily before regaining his senses* Azynthi... he has taken everything. Vitheo, Fernalla, Soluna, Brax - he has crept into all of their beings. Sivakaya has shown me this. You must find a way to reach them!
disable_text: You must find a way to reach the Gods!

quest_desc: You tried to give the Secrets of Creation to Lucian on Stowaway's Step, but he instructed you to bring it to Larviso in Loomingwood instead.
dialog_on_success: You've met her? She was really there? Then our work has not been for nothing! You must take this to Larviso in Loomingwood - He will be able to open it!

quest_desc: If you find four pieces of a treasure map, you can bring it to Cecil in Faerie's Brake to have it repaired.
required_items: Torn Treasure Map (Bottom Left),Torn Treasure Map (Bottom Right),Torn Treasure Map (Top Left),Torn Treasure Map (Top Right)
dialog_on_success: Fantastic! This is hard to come by, you know. It's uh... it makes for an enjoyable evening! Here, have it back and bring me more!
dialog_on_partial_success: You're missing at least one piece.

quest_desc: You've returned a compass to Asaga Underloft in Port Azure, and he has asked you to continue to explore the mysterious portals in search of his missing father.
dialog_on_success: I... I haven’t seen this in over a year. It belonged to my father. He’s... he’s missing. He claimed to have unlocked the secret of the Dusken Portal and was working on the Fernallan one next. He was obsessed, convinced they held mysteries too profound for the waking world to comprehend. Please, if you find him... bring him back! Here—take this. It’s his latest research.
disable_text: What is this? Are you making these yourself? Is this some sort of a trick?

quest_desc: Valrae Cleary in Faerie's Brake has asked you to find her a set of keys to Krakengard. The Bunk key and the Tower key are what she's after.
dialog_on_success: Ah yes, this is good. Thank you. I'm not afraid of the Molorai, I'll make quick work of any who bug me. Already have a reputation for doing that. Found this on one of 'em - here, have it.
dialog_on_partial_success: There's another one that I need too.
disable_text: I have these... didn't you give them to me?

quest_desc: Valrae Cleary in Faerie's Brake has asked you to bring her four Ogrespice leaves. Who knows what for?
dialog_on_success: Fantastic! This is hard to come by, you know. It's uh... it makes for an enjoyable evening! Here, have this as a token of my appreciation.
dialog_on_partial_success: I asked for four, please.
disable_text: I have these... didn't you give them to me?

quest_desc: You've powered your Vithean Rune

Wally Waldorf is near the shop in Stowaway's Step and he really wants a Moongill fish. 

Moongill are known to come out at night and are famously hard to catch.
dialog_on_success: Oh My Heavens! Vitheo's blessings! Fernalla's Blessings! Here, take this - I have no need for it!
disable_text: I already have all I can eat!

quest_desc: Jazmyn Challa in Port Azure has asked for you to bring back any clues that might prove her claim that Reavers are the true first people of Erenshor.
dialog_on_success: This is INCREDIBLE! Where did you find it? Oh, look how old it is! This is such an incredible insight into our place within Erenshor's history. Here - take this as my thanks. It should server you in places touched by the void. We hold no grudges against the Paladins of today, do not worry yourself. You have stated no war. We'll simply double our efforts to find our home to the North.
disable_text: Another copy... incredible. Keep that for yourself and enjoy the tale within.

quest_desc:
The odd cultists won't say much, but one has mistaken you for their friend 'Wyland' before realizing his error.

If you find this 'Wyland', he may be holding a note or a clue as to what they're up to...
dialog_on_success: You say you found this note on an apparation? Incredible...

quest_desc:
You have gathered seeds from all of the known Willows in Erenshor and given them to a Watcher high upon a hill in Willowwatch. 

In return, the Watcher has given you a special lens and claimed it will allow its wearer to spot hidden Sivakayans throughout the world. They are thought to wander nearly everywhere on occassion.
required_items: Azure Willow Seed,Braxonian Willow Seed,Duskenlight Willow Seed,Fernallan Willow Seed,Ripparian Willow Seed
dialog_on_success: You have bestowed upon me a gift, adventurer. Your travels prove your strength and perhaps you can help protect this world. Sivakayans walk among us - watching and invisible. Take this, it'll allow you to see them. Whether you dispatch them is up to you. Beware though - if they sense your awareness, they may attack... and some hold great power.
dialog_on_partial_success: These are Willow seeds? I have never seen them so close up! Are there more?
disable_text: I need but one seed from each tree, no more are necessary.

quest_desc: Cagnus Marlsen in Willowwatch has asked for you to clear out the old Willow shrine so they can use the fertile soil to grow crops for their settlement.
faction_affects: Citizens of Port Azure (1),People of Erenshor (1)
dialog_on_success: You've done it? This soil looks great! I'll get to plantin' as soon as I can! Here - I was usin' this to get back and forth to get supplies but I'm not gonna need it anymore and honestly, it's a pretty uncomfortable feelin' to use!
disable_text: Yeah ok I don't need all of it in bags, knock it off!

quest_desc: You have returned a journal to Wishlan that he lost ages ago. He was gracious, and offered you an old trinket he once held dear.
dialog_on_success: They had so much faith in me... and I was not able to help. I am glad to know they remembered my true intentions. Take this as my thanks, but before you go, please remove one and hand it to me - I lack the dexterity.

quest_desc: Wishlan handed you a bag of stones and asked for one to keep.
dialog_on_success: They're beautiful, aren't they? I cannot recall why I carried this bag, but it may aid you. If you cross paths one day with Soluna I hope you find the power to convince her to undo our curse. I have one final gift for you, my eyes can no longer focus on it.

quest_desc: Fredrick in Port Azure would like wolf meat.
dialog_on_success: Ah fantastic! This will be a fantastic steak for the guards!

quest_desc:
You've found a note on the Ghost of Wyland Sercher. 

Upon reading it, it has instructed you to speak a secret password to an "Elder Brother at the Ritual". 

Approach his brothers, and speak the word to them.
dialog_on_success: You've found a spectre of Wyland? Thankfully you've put it to rest. We are in your debt. If you want passage off of this island, come with us. Leap off the rocks under the statue of Vitheo with his spear and swim to the sandbar. We'll meet you there, along with our ship.  Speak not of this conversation or you'll put us all in danger.
